prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cyberpunk anime concert poster of Hatsune Miku performing as a gigantic translucent hologram above a packed futuristic arena. She has extremely long glowing turquoise twin-tails streaming in wide ribbons across the composition, a slim idol body, sleeveless gray-and-teal futuristic vest, teal tie, short pleated black skirt with cyan trim, thigh-high dark stockings, arm sleeves, headset, and glowing high heels. Pose her from a dramatic low angle with legs apart on a circular hologram stage, one hand holding a microphone near her mouth and the other arm reaching upward toward the viewer; place a square soft pixelated censor/blur block over the center of her face as in a generated preview. Use intense cyan, aqua, and electric blue lighting, volumetric beams shooting upward from the stage, transparent polygonal ribbons, scanlines, holographic grid patterns, floating triangle icons, particle sparks, and luminous hair strands. The arena below is filled with silhouetted audience hands and many blue glow sticks, with dark skyscraper-like trusses and LED rings in the background. Include exactly 4 visible text/UI blocks: a vertical glowing Japanese slogan on the left reading 繋がる想い、響け、未来へ。, a vertical glowing Japanese slogan on the right reading この歌が、キミの心に届きますように…, a lower-left cyan holographic song information panel with exactly 4 lines reading “♪ Universe Beat”, “// Temp: 128BPM”, “// Key: G#m”, and “// Mode: Lydian”, and a lower-right cyan holographic event panel headed ECHO×LINK with “VIRTUAL LIVE” and “2045” beneath it plus small equalizer bars and tiny technical glyphs. Make the illustration highly detailed, glossy, luminous, cinematic, high contrast, immersive, with a deep black background and radiant blue bloom, like a premium Japanese virtual idol live poster.
